_comment: Generated by macro-analyst on 2026-04-27 (pre-open, Bucharest 07:40 EEST). BNR Apr 24 reference rate is the last official close; weekend rates do not publish. Today's BNR rate publishes ~13:00 EET.

_qualitative_context.note: Coalition crisis evolved: PSD walked out Apr 20-23, 7 ministers resigned, Bolojan refuses to quit, AUR no-confidence motion expected within weeks. AUR leads polls at ~36%. BET reaction was a quick V-shape: -1.51% Apr 22 to 28,261, then +1.33% Apr 23 to 28,967, then +1.12% Apr 24 to 29,289.67 — only -1.1% from ATH (29,615). Market interpreted government continuity as base case despite headlines. Brent rallied to $105.33 Apr 24 (peak), now -4.7% intraday Monday on geopolitical de-risking; weekly +5.1% from $95.48 Apr 20 still net tailwind for SNP. EUR/RON cooling: BNR Apr 24 5.0928, Yahoo intraday today 5.0824 — testing the 5.05 boundary from above for the first time in 34 sessions. RO 10Y eased to 7.13% from spike high last week. NBR meets May 7 (10 days) — first-cut consensus but not confirmed. PNRR risk: ~1/3 of milestones in high-risk zone, €700m+ fines per delayed reform; PSD exit from coalition could derail the remaining reform agenda. PNRR deadline Aug 31, 2026.
_qualitative_context.regime_caveat: 70% YoY rally to ATH still active per reference doc — bias mean-reversion, skeptical of breakouts, weight relief-rally triggers.
